description: Private account by Barhun b. Salah ha-Tāhartī. Most details are about expenses for shipping flax. Mentions other goods, mainly camphor, which was bought in a price that is about a third of the regular price. Also mentions expenses for packages, shipments, taxes, and bribe. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #336) VMR
description_he: חשבון פרטי של ברהון בן צאלח הטאהרתי, על הוצאות משלוח פשתן, קמפור, מיסים ושוחד
